Get a Quote

GROW WITH US

Earn More by Partnering with Trai Inc.

You know businesses that need software, apps, or digital marketing — but building it yourself isn't your game. Send them to us, and we'll handle the engineering while you earn on every deal.

WHY PARTNER

Why 138+ Clients Trust Our Delivery

⚡

We Deliver, You Earn

You bring the relationship. We build the software, run the marketing, or deploy the AI automation. You earn a commission on every project — zero engineering overhead on your side.

🏗️

6 Years, 138+ Clients, Zero Drama

We have been shipping production software since 2020 across 12+ industries. Your referrals go to a team that delivers on time, on budget, with fixed-price contracts.

🤝

Your Brand, Our Engine

Need to white-label our work under your agency brand? We do that. Your client sees your name, we do the engineering behind the scenes.

📈

Recurring Revenue

Many of our projects turn into ongoing retainers — maintenance, marketing, new features. You earn on the initial deal and on every renewal.

PARTNERSHIP MODELS

Choose How You Want to Work With Us

💼

Referral Partner

IDEAL FOR: CAs, Business Consultants, Freelancers, Other Agencies

Know a business that needs a website, app, CRM, or marketing? Introduce them to us. If the deal closes, you earn a referral commission.

  • ✓ Earn 10-15% commission on every closed project
  • ✓ No selling required — just warm introductions
  • ✓ We handle the entire sales call, scoping, and delivery
  • ✓ Monthly payout on completed milestones
🏢

White-Label Partner

IDEAL FOR: Digital Agencies, Marketing Firms, IT Consultancies

You sell software services but do not have an in-house dev team? We become your invisible engineering department. You own the client relationship, we build under your brand.

  • ✓ Full white-label delivery — your branding, our code
  • ✓ Dedicated engineering team for your projects
  • ✓ Wholesale pricing with healthy margins for you
  • ✓ NDA-protected — your clients never know about us
🔗

Technology Partner

IDEAL FOR: SaaS Companies, Platform Providers, API Businesses

Your product plus our engineering creates a stronger offering for shared customers. Joint integrations, co-marketing, and combined go-to-market.

  • ✓ Joint solution development and integration
  • ✓ Co-branded case studies and marketing
  • ✓ Shared lead pipeline
  • ✓ Technical integration support from our team

WHO SHOULD PARTNER

You Are a Great Fit If You Are

  • 🎯 A Chartered Accountant serving MSME clients who need digital solutions
  • 🎯 A marketing agency that needs development support for client projects
  • 🎯 A business consultant who advises companies on digital transformation
  • 🎯 A freelance designer who needs a dev team to build what you design
  • 🎯 An IT consultancy without in-house engineering capacity
  • 🎯 A SaaS platform looking for integration and go-to-market partners

HOW IT WORKS

Three Steps to Start Earning

01

01 Apply

Fill in the form below or message us on WhatsApp. Tell us about your business and how you typically interact with clients who need tech services.

02

02 Get Onboarded

We set you up with a partner agreement, commission structure, and a direct line to our team. The whole process takes less than a week.

03

03 Refer & Earn

Send us warm introductions whenever you spot an opportunity. We handle the rest — scoping, building, delivering. You get paid when milestones are completed.

Ready to Partner?

Whether you want to refer one client or white-label our entire engineering team — let us talk. Book a 15-minute call or message us directly on WhatsApp.

Book a Partner Call Message on WhatsApp →
